Notes

Custom note/comment block for inline annotations. Custom HTML — no Lyte equivalent.

Basic Figma Synced 5 Variants × 3 Colors
Default Note
Basic

This is a sample note with some important information about the record.

With Timestamp

This is a sample note with some important information about the record.

2 hours ago
HTML
<!-- Default Note -->
<div class="zc-note">
    <div class="zc-note-content">
        <p>This is a sample note with some important information.</p>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Note with Timestamp -->
<div class="zc-note">
    <div class="zc-note-content">
        <p>This is a sample note with some important information.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="zc-note-meta">
        <span class="zc-note-timestamp">2 hours ago</span>
    </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-note {
    border: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
    border-radius: var(--zc-radius-rl, 8px);
    padding: 12px 16px;
    background: var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFFFFF);
}
.zc-note-content p {
    font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
    font-weight: var(--zc-p2-font-weight-regular, 400);
    color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-default, #1B1F23);
}
.zc-note-timestamp {
    font-size: var(--zc-p3-font-size, 12px);
    color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-subtle, #6B7280);
}
Note with Author
Avatar + Name
JD
John Doe 2 hours ago

Updated the form configuration settings.

Name Only
Jane Smith 5 minutes ago

Please review the latest deployment changes before merging.

HTML
<!-- Note with Avatar + Author -->
<div class="zc-note">
    <div class="zc-note-header">
        <div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-sm zc-avatar-full">JD</div>
        <span class="zc-note-author">John Doe</span>
        <span class="zc-note-timestamp">2 hours ago</span>
    </div>
    <div class="zc-note-content">
        <p>Updated the form configuration settings.</p>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Note with Name Only -->
<div class="zc-note">
    <div class="zc-note-header">
        <span class="zc-note-author">Jane Smith</span>
        <span class="zc-note-timestamp">5 minutes ago</span>
    </div>
    <div class="zc-note-content">
        <p>Please review the latest deployment changes.</p>
    </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-note-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.zc-note-author {
    font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
    font-weight: var(--zc-p2-font-weight-semibold, 600);
    color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-default, #1B1F23);
}
.zc-note-timestamp {
    font-size: var(--zc-p3-font-size, 12px);
    color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-subtle, #6B7280);
    margin-left: auto;
}
Note with Actions
Edit & Delete
John Doe

Remember to update the deployment settings.

Full Header
AS
Alice Smith 1 hour ago

Checked the API response — looks good to deploy.

HTML
<!-- Note with Actions -->
<div class="zc-note">
    <div class="zc-note-header">
        <span class="zc-note-author">John Doe</span>
        <div class="zc-note-actions">
            <button class="zc-note-action"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
            <button class="zc-note-action"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="zc-note-content">
        <p>Remember to update the deployment settings.</p>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Full Header: Avatar + Author + Timestamp + Actions -->
<div class="zc-note">
    <div class="zc-note-header">
        <div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-sm zc-avatar-full">AS</div>
        <span class="zc-note-author">Alice Smith</span>
        <span class="zc-note-timestamp">1 hour ago</span>
        <div class="zc-note-actions">
            <button class="zc-note-action"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
            <button class="zc-note-action"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="zc-note-content">
        <p>Checked the API response — looks good to deploy.</p>
    </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-note-actions {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 4px;
    margin-left: auto;
}
.zc-note-action {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    padding: 4px 6px;
    border-radius: var(--zc-radius-s, 4px);
    color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-subtle, #6B7280);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
}
.zc-note-action:hover {
    background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-hover, #F3F4F6);
    color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-default, #1B1F23);
}
Color Variants
Default

Default neutral note — standard annotations and general comments.

Info

Informational note — highlights helpful context or tips.

Warning

Warning note — indicates caution or potential issues.

HTML
<!-- Default (neutral) -->
<div class="zc-note zc-note-default">
    <div class="zc-note-content">
        <p>Default neutral note.</p>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Info (blue tint) -->
<div class="zc-note zc-note-info">
    <div class="zc-note-content">
        <p>Informational note.</p>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Warning (yellow tint) -->
<div class="zc-note zc-note-warning">
    <div class="zc-note-content">
        <p>Warning note.</p>
    </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-note-default {
    background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-subtle, #F9FAFB);
    border-color: var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
}
.zc-note-info {
    background: var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-subtle, #F5F8FE);
    border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-minimal, #C0D1FC);
}
.zc-note-warning {
    background: var(--zc-color-warning-surface-warning-surface-subtle, #FFFBEB);
    border-color: var(--zc-color-warning-border-warning-border-minimal, #FDE68A);
}
Read-only Note
Read-only
JD
John Doe 3 days ago

This note is locked and cannot be edited. It serves as a permanent record of the decision made during the sprint review.

Editable
You Just now

Click here to edit this note. This note supports inline editing.

HTML
<!-- Read-only Note -->
<div class="zc-note zc-note-readonly">
    <div class="zc-note-header">
        <div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-sm zc-avatar-full">JD</div>
        <span class="zc-note-author">John Doe</span>
        <span class="zc-note-timestamp">3 days ago</span>
    </div>
    <div class="zc-note-content">
        <p>This note is locked and cannot be edited.</p>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Editable Note -->
<div class="zc-note zc-note-editable">
    <div class="zc-note-header">
        <span class="zc-note-author">You</span>
        <span class="zc-note-timestamp">Just now</span>
        <div class="zc-note-actions">
            <button class="zc-note-action"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="zc-note-content" contenteditable="true">
        <p>Click here to edit this note.</p>
    </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-note-readonly {
    opacity: 0.75;
    cursor: default;
    user-select: text;
}
.zc-note-editable .zc-note-content {
    outline: none;
    cursor: text;
}
.zc-note-editable .zc-note-content:focus {
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
    border-radius: var(--zc-radius-s, 4px);
}
